title: 10 best herbal teas for hematuria
intro_desc: Herbal teas for hematuria are a natural remedy that helps alleviate the symptoms of blood in the urine, a condition that can be painful and distressing. They work by reducing inflammation and promoting urine flow. The best herbal teas for hematuria include Vaccinium macrocarpon, Equisetum arvense, Urtica dioica, Juniperus communis, Arctium lappa, Taraxacum officinale, Glycyrrhiza glabra, Plantago lanceolata, Rheum palmatum, and Hypericum perforatum. If left untreated, hematuria can lead to kidney damage and affect daily life, causing discomfort, anxiety, and potentially even social isolation.
